name: Async State Transitions Verified
description: Async operations (API calls, file uploads) that drive UI state must have their transition logic formally verified — especially error and timeout paths.
rationale: Async state machines (idle → loading → success/error) are deceptively simple but have subtle issues: race conditions, stale responses, retry logic. Formal verification ensures all paths terminate correctly.

examples.passes: Formalize(fetchMachine: idle/loading/success/error/retrying) → Verify(all paths reach terminal state: proved)
examples.fails: Fetch machine where a retry after timeout can loop forever (liveness violation)
